hero.title: Welcome
hero.subtitle: Association Initiative Al Amal Pour l'Intégration Sociale
hero.mission: We support young people and their families for sustainable social integration.

whoWeAre.title: WHO WE ARE
whoWeAre.associationName: Association Initiative Al Amal Pour L'integration Sociale
whoWeAre.description: Founded in 2018, is committed to supporting young people in precarious situations, particularly former residents of social protection establishments (EPS), to promote their socio-economic integration.
whoWeAre.imageAlt: Team of Association Initiative Al Amal
